steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

steps.text: Reach KPI added to the report document.
Reach KPI Copy duplicated in the authored report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const titles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__document-block-card strong')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return titles.length >= 2 && titles[0] === 'Reach KPI' && titles[1] === 'Reach KPI Copy'; })()

(() => { const titles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__document-block-card strong')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return titles.length >= 2 && titles[0] === 'Reach KPI Copy' && titles[1] === 'Reach KPI'; })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Save artifact')); return !!button && !button.disabled && button.getAttribute('aria-disabled') !== 'true'; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo
Get ReportDocument response: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const titles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__document-block-card strong')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return titles.length >= 2 && titles[0] === 'Reach KPI Copy' && titles[1] === 'Reach KPI'; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Reach KPI Copy') && text.includes('Reach KPI'); })()
